onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Never miss a class again. Manage your schedule easily and get notified on time.
onboarding.setupTitle: How would you like to add your schedule?
onboarding.uploadDesc: We'll automatically extract your classes using AI
onboarding.manualDesc: Add your classes one by one manually
onboarding.apiKeyDesc: To automatically extract your schedule from a photo, please enter your Google Gemini API Key. This is stored securely on your device.

class.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this class?

scan.title: Scan Result
scan.reviewText: Please review the extracted classes and make any necessary changes before saving.
scan.error: Failed to process image. Please try again or enter manually.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteScheduleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your entire schedule? This cannot be undone.
